推荐场景: 国际朋友聚会｜修复文化误会
60秒任务: 「文化误会」：礼貌差异/文化误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 文化解释｜误解修复｜语气判断｜礼貌｜幽默边界｜适应
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I think there may have been a misunderstanding.（指出误会）
I didn’t mean it that way.（澄清意图）
Let me clarify what I meant.（主动解释）
Maybe this is a cultural difference.（定位原因）
I can see why that sounded ___.（承认对方感受）
No offense intended.（说明无冒犯意图）
I should have explained the context first.（承担部分责任）
Could you tell me how it came across?（询问接收效果）
That wasn’t my intention at all.（强调原意）
Thanks for pointing it out.（接受提醒）
Let’s not assume bad intent.（避免升级）
Can we reset and start again?（关系修复）
Next time, I’ll be more careful with ___.（承诺调整）
I understand the impact, even if I meant it differently.（区分意图与影响）
What would be a better way to say it?（请教替代表达）
Let’s agree on how to handle this going forward.（建立后续规则）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: misunderstanding, intention, impact, context, assumption, apology
Verbs: clarify, explain, assume, offend, repair, reset
Adjectives: awkward, sensitive, unintended, respectful, careful, uncomfortable
Time / Place: next time, going forward, in a meeting, online, in public
Chunks: bad intent, cultural difference, come across, explain the context, reset the conversation, better way to say it
